headline: DuPont Announces Reverse Split. What It Means for the Stock.
summary: DuPont stock was unchanged late Tuesday after the chemicals company announced a 1-for-3 reverse stock split which will become effective next month.

headline: DuPont Announces Reverse Stock Split and Reaffirms 2026 Financial Guidance
summary: DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced that its Board of Directors has approved a reverse stock split of the Company's common stock, par value $0.01 per share, at a ratio of 1-for-3 as well as a reduction in the number of authorized shares of its common stock by a corresponding ratio (the "Reverse Stock Split").
